root.rep_text: สรุปรายการประจำวัน (A4)
root.sql:
SELECT distinct sc_com_m_branch.branch_id , sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.journal_date , sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.account_id
, (select account_name from sc_acc_m_account_master where account_id = sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.account_id ) as account_name , sum(sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.dr_amount) as dr_amount , sum(sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.cr_amount) as cr_amount , FPB_ACC_GET_JV_AMT ( sc_com_m_branch.branch_id , sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.journal_date , 'DR' ) as jv_amt
FROM sc_acc_journal_detail_firm ,sc_acc_journal_heading_firm ,sc_com_m_branch WHERE 1=1 and sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.doc_no = sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.doc_no and sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.entry_br_id = sc_com_m_branch.branch_id and sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.cancel_status = '0'
/*WHERE*/ --and sc_com_m_branch.branch_id = '02' --and sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.journal_date = '04/6/2019'
GROUP BY sc_com_m_branch.branch_id , sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.journal_date , sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.account_id
ORDER BY sc_com_m_branch.branch_id , sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.journal_date , sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.account_id
